title: ballota undulata
intro: Ballota undulata, also known as the wavy betony or undulate betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Ballota undulata are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds such as borneol, camphor, and borneol acetate, displaying anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Ballota undulata include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
